title: Metadata
description: Contains metadata about the animation, such as authoring information and custom data.

g.title: Generator
g.description: Name and version of the software that generated this animation

k.title: Keywords
k.description: List of keywords relevant to the animation content

tc.title: Theme Color
tc.description: Theme color of the animation as a hex string (e.g. "#FF0000")

x.title: Custom Metadata
x.description: Object where authors can store any custom data. The contents of this property are not validated by the schema.
